name: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd.
business: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd. designs and develops a hybrid-electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft called the Cavorite X7, which can carry seven people and is intended for regional air mobility. The company plans to sell these aircraft to civilian and military customers and also license its patented fan-in-wing technology.

exposures.sentence: We are an advanced aerospace Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) that is designing a next generation hybrid-electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft for the Regional Air Mobility (RAM) market.
We are an advanced aerospace Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM).

For vertical flight, electrical power for the powerful ducted fans in the wings and canards comes from two sources: an on-board generator driven by an internal combustion engine and an array of batteries.
Our business operating model is predicated on building and selling Cavorite X7 aircraft for both civilian and military use.

catalysts.sentence: We are now building a full-scale demonstrator aircraft that is expected to commence flight testing in 2026 or 2027.
We are targeting Type Certification prior to 2030.
Horizon anticipates commercialization of its aircraft beginning in 2028 or 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Morgan Stanley projects the eVTOL aircraft market could reach USD $1 trillion (base case) by 2040 and USD $9 trillion by 2050.
tamClaims.sentence: Morgan Stanley has projected that the eVTOL aircraft market could reach USD $1 trillion (in the base case) by 2040 and USD $9 trillion by 2050.
